error.signature: RuntimeError: Triton compilation failed: LLVM ERROR

verdict.summary: torch.compile or Triton JIT failed to compile a kernel. Common with complex model architectures or unsupported operations.

dead_ends.action: Upgrade Triton to latest version independently of PyTorch
dead_ends.why_fails: Triton version must match PyTorch; standalone upgrades cause ABI incompatibility
Triton caches in ~/.triton/cache, not __pycache__; wrong cache location

workarounds.action: Clear the Triton cache and retry
Fall back to eager mode for the failing operation
workarounds.how: model = torch.compile(model, mode='reduce-overhead')  # or disable: torch._dynamo.config.suppress_errors = True

workarounds.action: Set TORCH_COMPILE_DEBUG=1 to get the failing Triton IR
workarounds.how: TORCH_COMPILE_DEBUG=1 python train.py  # look for .ttir files in debug output
